messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

D:\Aapaavani\Avatarana\src\components\CurtainReveal.tsx:188:24
  186 |             className="curtain-particle"
  187 |             style={{
> 188 |               left: `${Math.random() * 100}%`,
      |                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  189 |               top: `${Math.random() * 100}%`,
  190 |               animationDelay: `${Math.random() * 2}s`,
  191 |               animationDuration: `${2 + Math.random() * 3}s`,

Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook "useEffect" is called conditionally. React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchZoneStats'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchZoneStats]
